dependency.helperModel: Linux spike re-executes native_overlay_cef_spike and dispatches cef_execute_process before argument parsing or Bevy initialization.

requiredArtifacts.role: Linux sandbox helper; present but not enabled by the Phase 1 spike
minimum declared locale payload; production locale policy remains undecided

tests.command: cargo test --manifest-path runtime-bevy/Cargo.toml -p threenative_runtime --test overlay_cef --features native-overlay-cef
cargo test --manifest-path runtime-bevy/Cargo.toml -p threenative_runtime --features native-overlay-cef --test overlay --test overlay_host
cargo run --manifest-path runtime-bevy/Cargo.toml -p threenative_runtime --bin native_overlay_cef_spike --features native-overlay-cef -- examples/chess/dist/chess.bundle

scenario.realInput: observed: Bevy cursor/button input was translated to CEF; choosing Black emitted chess:choose-side, the native game applied the AI opening move, and later snapshots updated the CEF HUD
scenario.noSecondaryWindow: pass: the modal probe reported one 1280x720 Bevy window and CEF remained windowless
scenario.noResizeWorkaround: pass: 10 modal open/close transitions completed at invariant 1280x720 geometry; all 10 closed raw paints were byte-identical

transparency.threshold: Board visible through every transparent region
transparency.observed: Chooser corner alpha was 29298/65535 (44.7%); the board is visible through the composited backdrop

modalRemoval.threshold: 10/10 transitions; no stale modal pixels and no resize
modalRemoval.observed: The automated CEF DOM probe completed 10 settings open/close transitions without resizing the single 1280x720 Bevy window. Paints alternated between two stable states: all 10 closed PNGs had SHA-256 2ee25ea7b048768da2d8753a60ea4f2a26ddd2a52232e33062f22678a9a6cff6 and AE=0 against the first closed HUD paint; all 9 retained subsequent open PNGs had SHA-256 084c0e7c8f565aa47056d4419b9a1fb690357ae52dc2059689c28fb7319005eb and AE=0 against the first open paint.

input.threshold: Real routed side-selection click and usable HUD controls
input.observed: A routed Black selection reached the native bridge, started the game with the AI opening move, and delivered updated chess:captures snapshots to the HUD. CSS hover is enabled by explicit desktop pointer/hover Blink capabilities; retained before/after paints differ and show the Black card hover state.

bridge.threshold: Send, subscribe, replay, visibility, and input mode
bridge.observed: The real CEF bridge trace recorded visibility false then true, pointer input mode, chess:choose-side send, native chess:captures sequence 2 delivery, and a late subscriber replay of chess:captures sequence 2.

frameCost.threshold: p95 overlay-host CPU cost <= 3 ms and no > 5 ms sustained regression over the no-overlay native baseline

observed.note: The optimized lookup conversion was measured in the 100-transition release probe; the paired 600-frame baseline/overlay distribution retained the identical debug sampling policy.

paintQueue.threshold: At most one pending complete paint per overlay; report drops
paintQueue.observed: Unit test proves pending length 1; reference run accepted 5 paints, uploaded 3, and reported 2 newest-frame replacements

memory.threshold: Record parent and child working set after settle

installedSize.threshold: Linux added physical on-disk executable package <= 250000000 bytes when CEF runs directly from the mounted compressed filesystem; report logical payload separately

observed.executionProof: The AppImage mounted normally, resolved libcef.so through an AppRun-local LD_LIBRARY_PATH, produced a nonblank CEF paint, routed choose-Black input, and delivered later chess:captures snapshots.

installedSize.note: The physical mounted-package metric is Linux-specific. Extraction fallback does not qualify. Other target packages require their own evidence.

startup.threshold: p95 first nonblank paint from process start <= 2500 ms over 10 warm runs

observed.timerOrigin: binary main entry before CEF subprocess dispatch
